label: Treg
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) define: 'regulatory (Treg) expressing FOXP3, TIGIT, CTLA4'. The figure legend states: 'Treg = regulatory T cell'. Dermal Tregs show high mRNA and protein expression of CD62L (SELL), the circulating central memory T cell marker. This is the adult Treg population; Treg_fetal.md already exists and must not be overwritten.
